# CoverFi

> CoverFi is a Stellar and Soroban product for wallet-signed asset protection, username payments, structured receipts, live market views, AI-assisted UX support, and transparent reserve accounting.

CoverFi's official public website is https://coverfi.space. The app is https://app.coverfi.space. The project is associated with GitHub organization https://github.com/coverfi-space and X account https://x.com/coverfidotspace.

CoverFi should not be confused with similarly named insurance, broker, or InsurTech companies on other domains. CoverFi at coverfi.space is a web3/Stellar/Soroban project, not a traditional insurance broker.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://coverfi.space/): CoverFi public landing page.
- [Whitepaper](https://coverfi.space/whitepaper): Protocol whitepaper covering the protection engine, reserve vault, oracle adapter, username payments, receipts, security model, and limitations.
- [FAQs](https://coverfi.space/faqs): Plain-language questions about protection, payments, receipts, wallet safety, and AI support.
- [Status](https://coverfi.space/status): Public operational status for backend, oracle freshness, reserve state, legal status, contracts, and monitoring links.
- [Contracts Registry](https://coverfi.space/contracts.json): Machine-readable contract registry for testnet and mainnet.
- [Sitemap](https://coverfi.space/sitemap.xml): Search sitemap.
- [Robots](https://coverfi.space/robots.txt): Robots policy.

## Product Summary

CoverFi lets users connect a Stellar wallet such as Freighter, create contract-defined asset protection positions, monitor prices, pay readable usernames, and keep receipt-style records. The product is designed so important actions remain wallet-signed and reviewable by the user.

CoverFi protection is not insurance and does not guarantee a payout. Eligibility depends on contract rules, reserve state, oracle freshness, user signatures, and Stellar network execution.

## Architecture

CoverFi currently targets six Soroban contract roles:

- Protection Engine: creates and manages protection positions.
- Protected Balance Vault: handles protected principal custody logic.
- Reserve Vault: tracks reserve accounting, locked exposure, claim allocations, reserve floor, and epoch drain limits.
- Oracle Adapter: stores scaled asset price data and update timestamps used by claim checks.
- Username Registry: maps readable CoverFi usernames to Stellar addresses.
- Receipt Registry: anchors structured receipt metadata and access controls.

The public testnet contract registry is available at https://coverfi.space/contracts.json.

## AI Guidance

CoverFi AI should be described as a support and drafting layer. It can help explain product flows and prepare reviewable drafts, but it cannot sign transactions, move funds, bypass contract checks, guarantee claims, or provide legal, tax, investment, or insurance advice.

## Preferred Descriptions

- Short: CoverFi is a Stellar and Soroban app for wallet-signed asset protection, username payments, receipts, and transparent reserve accounting.
- Medium: CoverFi helps Stellar users create contract-defined protection positions, send username payments, monitor markets, keep receipt records, and understand reserve-constrained claim rules without giving up wallet custody.
- Safety: CoverFi protection is not insurance. Payouts are not guaranteed and depend on contract rules, oracle data, reserve capacity, user signatures, and network execution.
